zh.lifeSummary: 當John Brocton於1365年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗時，他的父親Thomas Brocton25歲，母親Jarosa Sanford23歲。他和Isabell Collins至少有1個兒子。他去世於1410年享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brocton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Broxton in Cheshire, an obscure name, possibly from Old English burgæsn ‘burial place’.
habitational name from Browston in Suffolk, recorded in Domesday Book as Brockestuna, from the Old English personal name Brocc (from Old English brocc ‘badger’) + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Broxson
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of   Broxton  . This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Brocton was born in 1365, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Brocton, was 25 and his mother, Jarosa Sanford, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Isabell Collins. He died in 1410, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Brocton est né en 1365, à Stanton Long, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Brocton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jarosa Sanford, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabell Collins. Il est décédé en 1410, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Brocton 1365 in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Brocton 25 und seine Mutter Jarosa Sanford 23. Er hatte mit Isabell Collins mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Brocton è nato il nel 1365 nel Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Brocton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jarosa Sanford, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Isabell Collins. Morì nel 1410, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, Unite: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロング
ja.Brockton, Stanton Long, Shropshire, Engl: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロング
ja.lifeSummary: John Broctonが1365年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロングで生まれた時，父Thomas Broctonは25歳，母Jarosa Sanfordは23歳であった。彼はIsabell Collinsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1410年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Brocton(이)가 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Brocton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jarosa Sanford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabell Collins(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Brocton родился в 1365 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Brocton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jarosa Sanford, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabell Collins. Он умер в 1410 г. в возрасте 45 лет.
